description:
OUR CLIENT
  
Our client, Elders, is one of Australia’s most iconic agribusiness companies, recognised for its commitment to innovation, excellence and technology-driven solutions across the agriculture sector. With a strong focus on collaboration and continuous improvement, Elders is investing in technology to enhance efficiency, quality and outcomes across the business. As part of their digital transformation initiatives, Elders is seeking an experience Manual Test Analysts to contribute to the successful rollout of enterprise applications and transformation programs.
  
ABOUT THE ROLE
  
On a 12 month Fixed-Term contract, this role is responsible for defining, executing and managing all application testing activities. Reporting to the Enterprise Testing Manager, this role ensures the successful delivery of functionalities for the SysMod program and other enterprise initiatives. You will manage manual testing, design test plans and scenarios, facilitate testing lifecycle events, and work with vendors and System Integrators to ensure high-quality software delivery.
  
Key responsibilities include:

Design, develop, and articulate test plans, scenarios, and scripts across all testing phases, with a focus on SIT and UAT.
Facilitate testing lifecycle events and Agile ceremonies to support software development and rollout.
Leverage automation and manual testing tools such as RSAT and Azure DevOps to optimise the testing lifecycle.
Report defects, risks and key issues effectively and contribute to mitigation planning.
Identify opportunities to improve testing practices and implement best practices across projects.
  
ABOUT YOU
  
To be successful in this role, you will demonstrate:

Minimum 5 years’ experience as a Test Analyst, managing both automation and manual testing for sizeable transformation programs.
Experience testing and rolling out enterprise applications such as Dynamics 365 or Workday.
Ability to create detailed test scenarios, plans and scripts across SIT, UAT and other testing phases.
Strong collaboration skills, including working with vendors and System Integrators to meet testing requirements.
Proficiency in tools such as RSAT and Azure DevOps is highly desirable.
  
WHY JOIN US?

Join Elders to deliver critical enterprise software in a fast-paced, collaborative environment. Build your testing skills across automation and manual platforms, all within a supportive culture that values growth and work-life balance. For a confidential discussion, contact Caitlin Shears at EGM Recruitment.
